interpretation_notes.method: Unauthenticated probes. A 401 confirms the route is registered. A 404 is a candidate regression unless explainable.
interpretation_notes.probe_strategy: POST/PUT/PATCH sent with empty `application/json` body; 404 responses retried with `multipart/form-data` to handle file-upload endpoints.
interpretation_notes.phase4_usage: Re-run the same probe after each Phase 4 candidate deployment. Compare against this baseline to detect any route that newly returns 404 (= route dropped by deploy) or that flips from 401 to 200/500 (= auth regression).
